message:
test: add coverage for image tool results, qwq reasoning, auth permissions

- Add 4 Azure tool result conversion tests (text-only, image-only, mixed,
  empty) covering the image support added in 35ed28ba
- Add 6 Bedrock tool result conversion tests (text-only, image-only,
  mixed, empty, error status, mime format extraction)
- Add qwq-32b and qwq-1b assertions to model_is_reasoning test (b88817ba)
- Add Unix permission test verifying auth.json gets 0o600 mode (4dafcd95)
- Fix clippy ignored_unit_patterns in session_index.rs (Ok(_) -> Ok(()))
- Fix trailing whitespace in session_index.rs
- Fix rustfmt in compaction_worker.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
